title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: CORNELIUS WELLNESS CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 1151 N Adair Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm (503) 359-5564 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 359-5564 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Washington and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BCCTP HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WELLNESS CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORNELIUS WELLNESS CENTER
